heading: Considerations
body:
- Each Atlas host typically produces 1 GB of logs per day. Exporting logs
  incurs a data transfer cost. The exact data transfer cost varies depending on
  the destination, region, and cloud provider.

- Network issues or retries can cause duplicate log
  entries in your AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) bucket.

- The AWS (Amazon Web Services) IAM (Identity and Access Management) role and the S3 (Simple Storage Service) bucket must belong to the same AWS (Amazon Web Services)
  account.
